_description: Controls how the agent researches companies using Tavily and Gemini
_research_enabled_note: Master switch for all research features

web_search._max_results_note: Maximum search results to retrieve per query
web_search._search_depth_note: basic = faster, advanced = more comprehensive (costs more)
web_search._include_domains_note: Only search these domains (empty = all domains)
web_search._timeout_note: Maximum seconds to wait for search results

glassdoor_research._max_reviews_to_analyze_note: Maximum number of reviews to summarize
glassdoor_research._min_review_date_note: Ignore reviews older than this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
glassdoor_research._extract_interview_questions_note: Try to find interview questions from reviews

linkedin_research._extract_recent_posts_note: Analyze recent company posts (requires more API calls)

community_research._comment: Egyptian tech community research (Facebook groups, forums)
community_research._enabled_note: Disabled by default - requires manual Facebook group membership
community_research._search_query_template_note: General web search for community sentiment

summarization._extract_red_flags_note: Identify potential red flags (late payments, high turnover, etc.)

rate_limiting._gemini_delay_seconds_note: Delay between Gemini API calls (same as pipeline)
rate_limiting._max_retries_note: Maximum retries for failed API calls

dev_mode._skip_research_note: Skip all research in dev mode (faster testing)
dev_mode._use_mock_data_note: Use mock research results for testing
dev_mode._cache_results_note: Cache research results to avoid duplicate API calls
